nodes.label: AI as foundational structure provider
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable or incomplete creator
nodes.grounding_span: AI is a foundation builder and then I construct the house on top

nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool
nodes.grounding_span: it feels efficient in that I get to multi task

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I appreciate it when the AI is collaborative and proactive with ideas and concepts

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI failure to deliver or follow instructions
nodes.grounding_span: AI routinely messes up this process and says I created XYZ but the file is not there

nodes.label: Preserving personal creativity
nodes.grounding_span: I like handling most communication myself even though AI can be helpful

nodes.label: AI as skill development enabler
nodes.grounding_span: I try to maintain my skills by seeing what AI does and then creatively utilizing that to inform my own evolution in skillsets
